'''Dan Cragg''' (born [[September 6]], [[1930s|1939]], in Rochester, NY) is an American soldier, essayist, and science-fiction author, who co-wrote the novel ''[[Jedi Trial]]'' with [[David Sherman]].

{{Author-stub}}

==Star Wars works==
===Books===
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' (2004)
